name: Construct: North Room 1
description:
Completing this mission will instantly build a new structure on your home island.

Craft a Miner's Cameo from simple tools and common building materials.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

New Structure: North Room 1.  A hollow chamber north of the island's center to serve as a multipurpose space, with tons of room to expand.

effect.u_message:
Now that you have corridors snaking beneath your island, you could build rooms in various areas.  The northern quadrant might be a good place for another room.
A new recipe has been learned.  Craft this artifact to permanently upgrade the island.

New Structure: North Room 1.  A hollow chamber to the north of the island's center with one wall a long window to look down on the world, with tons of room to expand.
Construction complete.  A room has been dug out to the north of the central area in the bunker beneath the island.

description:
This strange metaphysical artifact is used to build a structure on the island.  Will be used automatically upon crafting, and can only be used once.

ASSOCIATED BUILD: North Room 1

name: Construct: North Room 2
description:
Completing this mission will instantly build a new structure on your home island.

Craft a Hollow Carver from simple tools and common building materials.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

New Structure: North Room 2.  Expand the northern room to fit more loot, furniture, or anything else you may need.

effect.u_message:
The northern room would be a lot more useful if it were larger and had a bigger window.  Time to get to work.
A new recipe has been learned.  Craft this artifact to permanently upgrade the island.

New Structure: North Room 2.  Expand the northern room to fit more loot, furniture, or anything else you may need.
Construction complete.  The northern room has grown.

description:
This strange metaphysical artifact is used to build a structure on the island.  Will be used automatically upon crafting, and can only be used once.

ASSOCIATED BUILD: North Room 2

name: Construct: north Room 3
description:
Completing this mission will instantly build a new structure on your home island.

Craft a Warped Reinforcement from simple tools and common building materials.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

New Structure: North Room 3.  Expand the northern room to very generous dimensions.

effect.u_message:
The northern room is a good start, but it could be much bigger.  Time to get to work.
A new recipe has been learned.  Craft this artifact to permanently upgrade the island.

New Structure: North Room 3.  Expand the northern room to very generous dimensions.
Construction complete.  The northern room has grown even further.

description:
This strange metaphysical artifact is used to build a structure on the island.  Will be used automatically upon crafting, and can only be used once.

ASSOCIATED BUILD: North Room 3

name: Construct: North Room Gallery
description:
Completing this mission will instantly build a new structure on your home island.

Craft a Cavernous Soul from simple tools and common building materials.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

New Structure: North Room Gallery.  Add an enclosed gallery to the northern room to allow viewing off the side of the island.

effect.u_message:
The northern room is a nice size, but you're on a floating island.  What if you had a place where you could admire the beautiful view without having to worry about the blowing winds?  Time to get to work.
A new recipe has been learned.  Craft this artifact to permanently upgrade the island.

New Structure: North Room 4.  Expand the northern room to its maximum size.
Construction complete.  The northern room is now larger.

description:
This strange metaphysical artifact is used to build a structure on the island.  Will be used automatically upon crafting, and can only be used once.

ASSOCIATED BUILD: North Room 4

name: Construct: North Side Rooms
description:
Completing this mission will instantly build a new structure on your home island.

Craft an Inverted Cube from simple tools and common building materials.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

New Structure: North Side Rooms.  Add two rooms on either side of the corridor leading to the northern room.

effect.u_message:
The northern room is a nice size, but it's just one room.  You could use a bit of separation between activities, and maybe a place to store some materials that you won't use as often.  Time to get to work.
A new recipe has been learned.  Craft this artifact to permanently upgrade the island.

New Structure: North Side Rooms.  Add two side rooms in the north for additional storage.
Construction complete.  The north now has two side rooms for additional storage.

description:
This strange metaphysical artifact is used to build a structure on the island.  Will be used automatically upon crafting, and can only be used once.

ASSOCIATED BUILD: North Side Rooms
